mads.description: MAD = Mean Absolute Deviation (matching Li et al.)

interpretation.differential_effect: Format biases decrease with instruction tuning. Content bias increases.
interpretation.significance: Pattern holds across all 3 model families (N=6 model variants, 8,100 judgments).
interpretation.comparison_to_literature: Flip rates consistent with Li et al. (2025) range of 20-48%.
